title: Discount calculator misses inclusive tiers and coupon stacking
prompt: Fix the discount calculator. Tier thresholds are inclusive: 10000 cents gets 10% off and 20000 cents or more gets 15% off. Coupons apply after the tier discount, not by adding percentages together. Keep the change focused. The regression command is `npm test`; it should fail before the fix and pass after the fix.
